name: inspectiq
description: AI-assisted vehicle inspection and condition report platform portfolio project.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @inspectiq/shared && npm run build -w @inspectiq/api && npm run build -w @inspectiq/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @inspectiq/shared && npm run dev -w @inspectiq/api
scripts.lint: npm run build -w @inspectiq/shared && npm run lint -w @inspectiq/api && npm run lint -w @inspectiq/web
scripts.test: npm run build -w @inspectiq/shared && npm run test -w @inspectiq/api && npm run test -w @inspectiq/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @inspectiq/shared && npm run typecheck -w @inspectiq/api && npm run typecheck -w @inspectiq/web
